section_title: Power to arrest absconding contributionry:-- The Court, at any time either before or after making a winding up
content:
280. Power to arrest absconding contributionry:-- The Court, at any time either before or after making a winding up
order and on proof of probable cause for believing that a contributory is or about to quit Bangladesh or otherwise to abscond,
or to remove or conceal any of his property, for the purpose of evading payment of calls or of avoiding examination
respecting the affairs of the company, may cause the contributory to be arrested and his books and papers and movable
property to be sized, and him and them to be safe castody until such times as the Court may order.
